pages.text: The first major milestone requires defeating the Energium Golem. This powerful boss guards ancient secrets in Energium Temples found in desert and mesa biomes.

pages.title: Energium Temple
pages.text: Temples generate in deserts/mesas.$(br2)The golem awaits on the $(l)second floor$().

pages.title: Energium Golem
pages.text: Stats:$(br)- 500 HP$(br)- Immune to knockback and ranged weapons
Drops:$(br)11 Energium Keys$(br)1 Energium Core$(br)Combat Mechanics:$(br2)Melee:$(br)- Powerful punches with extreme knockback$(br2)Ranged:$(br)- Shoots energy from the core

pages.title: Energium Vaults
pages.text: Use 11 keys from the golem to open vaults in temple's secret rooms. Contains smithing templates and some rare resources.

pages.title: Core Utilization
pages.text: Energium Core is essential for crafting the Energium Controller.$(br2)When activated with Redstone, blocks all power-based effects within a 48-block radius.
